MINI MINUTES:

Anna M. Costa for plaintiff and moving party: Willim D. Clark

NO OTHER APPEARANCE WAS STATED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED WITH MODIFICATIONS. Plaintiff's motion for a protective order is denied in part and granted in part. The motion is denied as to defendants Gould, Buffalo, and Warren Pumps Inc. Plaintiff has not established good cause to limit the examination by said defendants. The Court also notes the previous representations by counsel as to the limited amount of further examination.

The motion is granted as to defendant Gardner-Denver Inc. The Court has reviewed the transcript of the proceedings on June 23, 2005 attached as Exhibit B to defendant's opposition as well as the relevant portions of the transcripts attached to plaintiff's reply. The Court finds good cause to limit the examination by counsel for Gardner-Denver Inc. to an additional one and a half hours. Counsel is admonished to refrain from asking argumentative questions that unduly prolong the deposition.

All requests for monetary sanctions are denied.
